content.json:
# Search Dashboard
Monitor frontend search behavior: filter usage, search volume, and user interaction patterns.

content.query:
customEvents 
| where name == "search" 
| where operation_Name == "/search" 
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend offset = todouble(customMeasurements.offset)
| sort by session_Id asc, timestamp asc 
| extend SecondsSinceLastAction = datetime_diff('second', timestamp, prev(timestamp)) 
| extend IsNewNameSearch = iif(offset == 0 and (prev(session_Id) != session_Id or SecondsSinceLastAction > 5), 1, 0) 
| extend SearchGroupId = row_cumsum(IsNewNameSearch)
// Group by the sequence first, then count the sequences per hour
| summarize SequenceStartTime = min(timestamp) by session_Id, SearchGroupId
| summarize SearchCount = count() by bin(SequenceStartTime, 1h)
| order by SequenceStartTime asc
content.title: Searches Per Hour

content.query:
customEvents 
| where name == 'search' 
| where operation_Name == "/search" 
| where timestamp {TimeRange} 
| extend d = customDimensions 
| extend offset = todouble(customMeasurements.offset)
| sort by session_Id asc, timestamp asc 
| extend SecondsSinceLastAction = datetime_diff('second', timestamp, prev(timestamp)) 
| extend IsNewNameSearch = iif(offset == 0 and (prev(session_Id) != session_Id or SecondsSinceLastAction > 5), 1, 0) 
| extend SearchGroupId = row_cumsum(IsNewNameSearch)
// Collapse the multi-page results into a single row per search sequence
| summarize 
    DebtorNameUsed = max(tobool(d.debtorNameUsed) == true or tostring(d.debtorNameUsed) =~ 'true'),
    CaseNumberUsed = max(isnotempty(tostring(d.caseNumber))),
    ChaptersUsed = max(isnotempty(tostring(d.chapters)) and tostring(d.chapters) != '[]'),
    DivisionUsed = max(isnotempty(tostring(d.divisionCodes)) and tostring(d.divisionCodes) != '[]'),
    ExcludeClosedUsed = max(tobool(d.excludeClosedCases) == true or tostring(d.excludeClosedCases) =~ 'true')
    by session_Id, SearchGroupId
// Final count of unique search sequences where these filters were active
| summarize 
    DebtorName = countif(DebtorNameUsed),
    CaseNumber = countif(CaseNumberUsed),
    Chapters = countif(ChaptersUsed),
    DivisionCodes = countif(DivisionUsed),
    ExcludeClosedCases = countif(ExcludeClosedUsed)
| project DebtorName, CaseNumber, Chapters, DivisionCodes, ExcludeClosedCases
content.title: Filter Usage Counts

content.query:
customEvents 
| where name == 'search' 
| where operation_Name == "/search" 
| where timestamp {TimeRange} 
| extend d = customDimensions 
| extend offset = todouble(customMeasurements.offset)
| sort by session_Id asc, timestamp asc 
| extend SecondsSinceLastAction = datetime_diff('second', timestamp, prev(timestamp)) 
| extend IsNewNameSearch = iif(offset == 0 and (prev(session_Id) != session_Id or SecondsSinceLastAction > 5), 1, 0) 
| extend SearchGroupId = row_cumsum(IsNewNameSearch)
| summarize 
    timestamp = min(timestamp), // This restores your timestamp column
    HasDebtorName = iif(max(tobool(d.debtorNameUsed) == true or tostring(d.debtorNameUsed) =~ 'true'), 'Yes', 'No'), 
    HasCaseNumber = iif(max(isnotempty(tostring(d.caseNumber))), 'Yes', 'No'), 
    Chapters = any(tostring(d.chapters)), 
    ExcludeClosed = any(tostring(d.excludeClosedCases))
    by session_Id, SearchGroupId
| order by timestamp desc 
| project timestamp, HasDebtorName, HasCaseNumber, Chapters, ExcludeClosed
| take 100
content.title: Recent Searches

content.query:
customEvents 
| where name == "search" 
| where operation_Name == "/search" 
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = customDimensions 
| extend offset = todouble(customMeasurements.offset)
| sort by session_Id asc, timestamp asc 
| extend SecondsSinceLastAction = datetime_diff('second', timestamp, prev(timestamp)) 
| extend IsNewNameSearch = iif(offset == 0 and (prev(session_Id) != session_Id or SecondsSinceLastAction > 5), 1, 0) 
| extend SearchGroupId = row_cumsum(IsNewNameSearch)
| summarize 
    // This logic ensures we catch 'true' as a string or a boolean
    WasDebtorSearch = max(tostring(d.debtorNameUsed) =~ "true" or tobool(d.debtorNameUsed) == true)
    by session_Id, SearchGroupId
| extend Intent = iif(WasDebtorSearch == true, "Debtor Name Used", "Other Filter Used")
| summarize TotalSearches = count() by Intent
content.title: Debtor Name Field Usage

content.query:
let details = pageViews | where name contains "Case Detail" | project ViewTime = timestamp, session_Id;
customEvents
| where name == "search"
| where operation_Name == "/search"
| extend offset = todouble(customMeasurements.offset)
| sort by session_Id asc, timestamp asc
| extend SecondsSinceLastAction = datetime_diff('second', timestamp, prev(timestamp))
| extend IsNewNameSearch = iif(offset == 0 and (prev(session_Id) != session_Id or SecondsSinceLastAction > 5), 1, 0)
| extend SearchGroupId = row_cumsum(IsNewNameSearch)
| extend NextSearchStart = next(timestamp)
| join kind=leftouter details on session_Id
| extend isSuccess = iif(ViewTime > timestamp and (isempty(NextSearchStart) or ViewTime < NextSearchStart), 1, 0)
| summarize 
    MaxPageReached = max(round((offset / 50) + 1, 0)),
    SearchSuccess = max(isSuccess)
    by session_Id, SearchGroupId
| summarize 
    TotalUserSearches = count(),
    SuccessfulSearches = sum(SearchSuccess),
    AvgPageDepth = round(avg(MaxPageReached), 2)
| where TotalUserSearches > 0
| extend ClickThroughRate = round(toreal(SuccessfulSearches) / TotalUserSearches * 100, 2)
| project ClickThroughRate, AvgPageDepth, TotalUserSearches
content.title: Debtor Name Search CTR and Pagination Depth

content.query:
let details = pageViews | where name contains "Case Detail" | project ViewTime = timestamp, session_Id;
customEvents
| where name == "search"
| where operation_Name == "/search"
| extend offset = todouble(customMeasurements.offset)
| sort by session_Id asc, timestamp asc
| extend SecondsSinceLastAction = datetime_diff('second', timestamp, prev(timestamp))
| extend IsNewNameSearch = iif(offset == 0 and (prev(session_Id) != session_Id or SecondsSinceLastAction > 5), 1, 0)
| extend SearchGroupId = row_cumsum(IsNewNameSearch)
| summarize 
    MaxPageInSession = max(round((offset / 50) + 1, 0)),
    Intent = "Debtor Name Used" // We know these are manual searches
    by session_Id, SearchGroupId
| summarize 
    AvgPageReached = round(avg(MaxPageInSession), 2),
    MaxPageReached = max(MaxPageInSession),
    TotalEvents = count() // This will now show 3
    by Intent
content.title: Pagination Depth

content.json:
## Click Tracking Analytics

These visualizations are based on `searchResultClick` events logged when users click debtor name search results.

**Match Type Presence** — Percentage of clicked results where each match type contributed to the score. Phonetic matches are only counted when they are the sole or primary match type. Answers: *How often does each strategy appear in results users choose?*

**Match Distribution** — Shows which matches users click at the 90th percentile, median (50th), and 10th percentile levels.

> Note: Data is only available from the date this feature was deployed.

content.query:
let totalClicks = toscalar(
    customEvents
    | where name == "searchResultClick"
    | where timestamp {TimeRange}
    | count
);
customEvents
| where name == "searchResultClick"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = customDimensions
| extend matchTypes = parse_json(tostring(d.matchTypes))
| extend matchTypesArray = iif(isarray(matchTypes), matchTypes, dynamic([]))
| extend matchTypeCount = array_length(matchTypesArray)
// Only include phonetic if it's the only match type or primary (first in array)
| mv-expand matchType = matchTypesArray to typeof(string)
| extend matchTypeIndex = indexof(tostring(matchTypesArray), tostring(matchType))
| where matchType != "phonetic" or matchTypeCount == 1 or matchTypeIndex == 0
| summarize PresenceCount = count() by matchType
| extend PresencePct = iif(totalClicks > 0, round(toreal(PresenceCount) / totalClicks * 100, 1), 0.0)
| order by PresenceCount desc
| project MatchType = matchType, Count = PresenceCount, ['Presence %'] = PresencePct
content.title: Match Type Presence in Clicked Results

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "searchResultClick"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend e = customMeasurements
| extend rank = toint(e.rank)
| summarize
    ['90th Percentile'] = percentile(rank, 90),
    Median = percentile(rank, 50),
    ['10th Percentile'] = percentile(rank, 10)
| project packed = pack("90th Percentile", ['90th Percentile'], "Median", Median, "10th Percentile", ['10th Percentile'])
| mv-expand kind=array packed
| project Percentile = tostring(packed[0]), Rank = toint(packed[1])
content.title: Match Rank Distribution (Which position do users click?)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == "searchResultClick"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend d = customDimensions
| extend e = customMeasurements
| extend rank = toint(e.rank)
| extend matchScore = todouble(e.matchScore)
| extend matchTypes = tostring(parse_json(tostring(d.matchTypes)))
| extend higherRanked = parse_json(tostring(d.higherRankedResults))
| extend SkippedHigherRanked = iif(array_length(higherRanked) > 0, "Yes", "No")
| project
    timestamp,
    SessionId = session_Id,
    Rank = rank,
    MatchScore = matchScore,
    MatchTypes = matchTypes,
    SkippedHigherRanked
| order by timestamp desc
| take 100
content.title: Individual Session Deep Dive
